title: Patch-Based Contrastive Learning and Memory Consolidation for Online Unsupervised Continual Learning

method.name: Patch-Based Contrastive Learning and Memory Consolidation (PCMC)

operation.wake_periods: Identify and cluster incoming stream data
operation.sleep_periods: Retrain encoder and consolidate data representations

challenges: Non-stationary data stream (number of classes increases with time)
Unlabeled data requiring real-time identification of novel classes
No ability to store observed data for future replay
applications: AI-powered drone exploring a new construction site
Face recognition system classifying unseen people
